text:
When we retired our Q400 fleet, we reserved an aircraft for research and development of the latest in zero-emissions technology. This week, we handed it over to ZeroAvia to turn into the world’s largest hydrogen-electric commercial aircraft! Together we’re advancing new technology to accelerate our progress toward net zero carbon emissions by 2040.
#zeroavia #netzero #aviation #avgeek #tech #sustainability
